_publications._publicationTitle: A transcriptomic, proteomic, and functional genetic atlas dissects neurofibromin function in the peripheral nervous system.

_contextSnippet: SHP2 inhibition showed a consistently superior biochemical response and underscoring the likely importance of SOS2 compensation in NF1 mutant PNS tumor cells
details: SHP2 inhibition showed a consistently superior biochemical response compared to SOS1 inhibition in MPNST cell lines including JH002-2
